name: PTC Windchill PLM API
what_it_does: PTC Windchill REST APIs for product lifecycle management (PLM) platform. Enables AI agents to manage product structure and bill of materials (BOM) data retrieval for engineering and manufacturing, handle engineering change order (ECO) and change notice workflow status tracking, access CAD document and drawing version management data, retrieve product configuration and variant management data for configure-to-order workflows, manage product quality and non-conformance tracking data, handle supplier collaboration and approved vendor list (AVL) data, access EBOM to MBOM conversion and as-built product structure data, retrieve product compliance data for RoHS, REACH, and conflict minerals tracking, manage product portfolio and program management data, and integrate PLM data with ERP, MES, and supply chain systems.
use_cases: Retrieving BOM data from manufacturing integration agents
Tracking engineering change requests from product development agents
Monitoring product compliance from regulatory reporting agents
Accessing CAD versions from design collaboration agents
not_for: Software product management without physical product and CAD data
Simple document management without PLM and engineering change workflows
Non-manufacturing industries without product lifecycle and BOM management
best_when: A manufacturer using Windchill PLM wants AI agents to automate BOM retrieval, engineering change tracking, product compliance monitoring, supplier collaboration, and ERP/MES integration.
avoid_when: ENGINEERING RISK: Windchill controls product structure and change authorization — automated BOM changes or ECO approvals without engineering and manufacturing review cause incorrect production builds. Product configuration automation without engineering validation creates as-built discrepancies. Regulatory compliance data (RoHS, REACH) requires certified compliance engineer review before regulatory filings.

auth.notes: Windchill uses OAuth 2.0 and session-based authentication. Developer portal at developer.ptc.com. REST API available from Windchill 12+ (REST replaces SOAP in newer versions). Webhooks for PLM event notifications. Java SDK primary for legacy integrations. Cloud-hosted (Windchill+) and on-premise deployment. Boston, Massachusetts HQ (PTC Inc.).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise license
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual license per user and product module; Windchill+ cloud subscription available
pricing.notes: Boston, Massachusetts. PTC founded 1985. Public (PTC NASDAQ). Windchill is the world's most deployed PLM platform. Strong in automotive, aerospace, defense, and industrial manufacturing. Windchill+ cloud option launched 2021. ThingWorx integration for IIoT-PLM bridge. Competes with Siemens Teamcenter and Dassault 3DEXPERIENCE for enterprise PLM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; depends on deployment capacity

known_agent_gotchas: ENGINEERING RISK: BOM modification or ECO approval automation without engineering review creates incorrect product builds; all PLM change actions require engineering authorization
REST vs. SOAP/Java API — Windchill REST API is available from version 12+; older deployments use SOAP or Java SDK; verify your Windchill version before building REST integrations
On-premise deployment — most Windchill deployments are on-premise; Windchill+ cloud available but less common; network access requires VPN or cloud deployment
ITAR controlled data — aerospace and defense Windchill instances may contain ITAR-controlled technical data; access requires US person verification and export control compliance
BOM lifecycle states — Windchill BOM has lifecycle states (In Work, Under Review, Released); only Released BOM is production-valid; always check lifecycle state before using BOM data
Workspace context — Windchill uses workspace context for in-progress design; API queries without workspace context return released production data; understand workspace vs. released data
agent_readiness.security_notes: PLM and engineering data. SOC2, ITAR, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Product BOM, CAD, and engineering change data.

security_score_components.security_notes: PLM. SOC2, ITAR, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Product structure and engineering data.
